title: Industrial Engineering (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Industrial Engineering (English) Mission and Vision

To be internationally recognized for providing world-class Industrial Engineering education.

To train Industrial Engineers who are creative, have strong communication skills, are self-confident and can conduct scientific research, with an academic staff that is constantly improving themselves, strengthened by international collaborations and dedicated to providing high-quality education, and who have the analytical and critical thinking skills required to successfully work in production, management, health and other sectors.

DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL ENGINEERING PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL OBJECTIVES

PEO-1.

Can make a career as distinguished engineers in a wide range of sectors including manufacturing, management and healthcare;

PEO-2.

Can continue their academic careers in national and international areas;

PEO-3.

Can develop and execute projects with research skills, individual and teamwork skills to solve real-world problems;

PEO-4.

Can adapt to technological and social changes, can constantly renew themselves in professional matters;

PEO-5.

Can assume leadership roles in decision-making, initiating and managing change within the organization they work in;

PEO-6

. To produce graduates who can contribute to the welfare of society and the development of the profession through active participation in social and/or professional activities with economic, social and ethical awareness and sensitivity.
